titleStmt.title: SII 6.868: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 868. (A.R. No. 288 of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmāN kauśikasadōtrabhūṣaṇaḥ peddināyakaḥ . cittāmaṁcchiprabhusutaḥ svā
yurvvaṁśābhivṛddhayē . 1 svasti śrī śākavarṣē vasuśaśinayanakṣmāmitē mēṣagērkkē kālē pu
ṇyapraśastē viṣuritinṛharēssiṁhaśailādhipasya . bhaṁḍārē gaṁḍaniṣkau marīcaguḷalasatpānasa
tpāyasādisphūrjjannaivēdyasiddhyai pratiśaradamadādāśaśāṁkārkkatāraṁ . 2 Ayamēva
vunaḥ prādādgaṁḍaniṣkadvayaṁ harēḥ . vimānōparisaṁjātaplakṣāśvatthādi vṛkṣakāN
. 3 Uddharttuṁ parisaṁśōddhya svābhīṣṭaphalaThe syllable la is written below the line.siddhayē . pālayaṁtvaniśaṁ dharmmamimaṁ vaiṣṇavasa
ttamāḥ . 4 svasti śrī . śakavarṣaṁbulu 1218 guneṇṭhi mēṣasaṁkrāṁtināṁḍu cittāmaṁcchināya
kuni koḍku peddināyaku tama kabhīṣṭasiddhigā prativiṣuvunnu pānamu pāyasamu ni
vēdyamu Appālasahitamu 1 Utpannamāragiṁpa śrībhaṁḍāramaṁddu Arcchamāḍalu
reṁḍu 2 vīra śrīvimānamu mīṁda molacina ceṭṭupuccuṭaku nityamunnu Oka Appamu
1 śeluṭaku Aca mā 2 Ī Appamu ceṭṭupucchina vonikāṟru konaṁgalāru . Ī dharmmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa
śatruṇāpi kṛtō dharmmaḥ pālanīyō manīṣibhiḥ . śatrurēva hi śa
trussyāddharmmaśśatrurnna kasyacit . 7 śrī śrī śrī śrī śrīThe figure of a fish on a pedestal overshadowed by an umbrella is carved on the right side of inscription.
Digital edition of SII 6.868 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
